commit.subject: LU-18351 obdclass: debug jobstat scaling race
commit.message:
LU-18351 obdclass: debug jobstat scaling race

Race triggering a memory leak

Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=conf-sanity
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: If75db86ac2a174a7cb4776cdb7323fcc5fcdebd5
